heading: Definitions
label: 8921 Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–272, § 1(a)128 Stat. 2952Dec. 18, 2014“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Ukraine Freedom Support Act of 2014’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–272, § 1(a)128 Stat. 2952Dec. 18, 2014“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Ukraine Freedom Support Act of 2014’.”

children.heading: Account; correspondent account; payable-through account
children.label: 1 Account; correspondent account; payable-through account
children.text: The terms “account”, “correspondent account”, and “payable-through account” have the meanings given those terms in .section 5318A of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs and the Committee on Financial Services of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Defense article; defense service; training
children.label: 3 Defense article; defense service; training
children.text: The terms “defense article”, “defense service”, and “training” have the meanings given those terms in .section 2794 of this title

children.heading: Financial institution
children.label: 4 Financial institution
children.text: The term “financial institution” means a financial institution specified in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), (E), (F), (G), (H), (I), (J), (M), or (Z) of .section 5312(a)(2) of title 31

children.heading: Foreign financial institution
children.label: 5 Foreign financial institution
children.text: The term “foreign financial institution” has the meaning given that term in section 561.308 of title 31, Code of Federal Regulations (or any corresponding similar regulation or ruling).

children.heading: Foreign person
children.label: 6 Foreign person
children.text: The term “foreign person” means any individual or entity that is not a United States citizen, a permanent resident alien, or an entity organized under the laws of the United States or any jurisdiction within the United States.

children.heading: Knowingly
children.label: 7 Knowingly
children.text: The term “knowingly”, with respect to conduct, a circumstance, or a result, means that a person has actual knowledge, or should have known, of the conduct, the circumstance, or the result.

children.label: A
children.text: an individual who is a citizen or national of the Russian Federation; or

children.label: B
children.text: an entity organized under the laws of the Russian Federation.

children.label: A
children.text: the exclusive economic zone of the Russian Federation in waters more than 500 feet deep;

children.label: C
children.text: shale formations located in the Russian Federation.
